User.title: User
User.description: A user of the Aviator bot system.

phoneNumber.description: The user's Zimbabwe phone number (unique identifier).

password.description: The user's hashed or plain password for the bot.

isApproved.description: Whether the user has paid and been approved by the creator.

isPendingApproval.description: Whether the user has requested approval after payment.

activeUsers.description: Number of users currently logged in.

/users/{phoneNumber}.description: Collection of bot users indexed by phone number.
